input: Bug report (moq.analyzers issue #1086 / #1067): Moq1203 false-positive diagnostic fires when Returns/ReturnsAsync is called inside an extension method that wraps Moq Setup configuration. The extension method returns a Moq fluent interface type (IReturns, ICallback, ISetup, etc.). Where in the analyzer pipeline is the most likely bug, and what is the smallest fix shape?
